build.build: tsc -b && vite build && cp dist/index.html dist/404.html
build.prebuild: npm run lean:graph && npm run generate-index && npm run content:coverage && npm run validate-graph && npm run validate-references

dev.dev: npm run lean:graph && npm run generate-index && npm run content:coverage && npm run validate-graph && npm run validate-references && vite

graph.depcruise:graph: depcruise src --output-type dot | dot -T svg > docs/uml/dependency_graph.svg

lean.validate-lean: npm run validate-graph && npm run lean:build && npm run lean:graph && npm run validate-no-fake-lean-certificates && tsx scripts/core/validate-lean-diff.ts

other.docs:uml: java -jar scripts/plantuml.jar docs/uml/lean_architecture.puml docs/uml/lean_pipeline_sequence.puml docs/uml/proof_trace_factor_bruijn.puml docs/uml/project_class_diagram.puml -o images

validation.full-check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run depcruise && npm run validate-references && npm run validate-graph && npm run validate-lean && npm run content:coverage && npm run bridge:audit
